Home › Orange County › Orlando › CAFE 34 ISTANBUL
D 68

CAFE 34 ISTANBUL

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: May 18, 2026

CAFE 34 ISTANBUL is a Mediterranean restaurant at 8255 INTERNATIONAL DR #144B in Orlando, Orange County, in Central Florida. At its most recent health inspection on May 18, 2026, it received a grade of D with a score of 68 out of 100. The inspection noted 3 high-priority, 1 intermediate, and 5 basic violations. By health score, it is safer than 7% of Orange County restaurants. Diners give it an average rating of 4.7 stars across 11388 reviews. Typical prices fall in the $20–80 range. Menu options are noted as suitable for vegetarian, dairy-free, keto, paleo, halal, and healthy diners.

Inspections trending: stable · last inspected 40 days ago

Get directions Call (407) 601-7712

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. May 18, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    3 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 5 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation (×3)
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used

  2. December 16, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    1 high-priority · 3 intermediate · 5 basic

    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×2)
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×2)
    • 27 — Water source safe; hot and cold water under pressure
    • 32 — Bathrooms
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used
